CheckTitle: Review cross-tenant access default inbound policy
Description: Checks whether the default cross-tenant access policy allows inbound B2B collaboration and B2B direct connect from all external tenants. Unrestricted inbound access increases the risk of external account compromise spreading to your tenant.
Risk: When inbound cross-tenant access defaults allow all external tenants, any compromised account in any external organization can be invited as a guest or connect via B2B direct connect. This expands your attack surface to every Entra ID tenant globally.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review and restrict the default inbound cross-tenant access policy. Consider blocking inbound B2B collaboration by default and explicitly allowing only trusted partner organizations. Use cross-tenant access settings to control which external apps and users can access your resources.

Frameworks.source: AI-generated mapping — not yet verified against published benchmark
